reviews.review_description: One of the first 2D maze shooting games was Wolfenstein. This is a great similar, but 3D shooting game. It could be lots of fun. I gave it 3 stars because unlike Wolfenstein, each time you are killed, this starts you at the beginning. It gets tiring repeating the same long sequence to get back to where you were when you were killed. If you are killed along the way, you begin again. I eventually got pretty far, but never out of the first level. I would have liked to have experienced the rest of the levels, but I couldn't take starting over again and again. The option to begin where you were killed should be programmed in.
I loved good graphics nice action!

I’m enjoying this game when I actually get a chance to play it. I’m wondering why new releases are completely no out on the go, and not backwards compatible with quest. In my opinion anything that comes out on here, should instantly be playable on quest as well.

developer_response.body:
Hello

Thank you for your comment and for playing Green Beret.

We think just like you, but it is not up to us that the game is available for Quest.

Regards and thanks again!

reviews.review_description:
When this came out I didn’t hesitate. My 
“Joy” was short lived, I generally use my Go when I’m lying in bed, or where space is limited. What disappointed  me the most, was that you can only turn by 
looking in that direction, great if your 
standing or are sitting on a revolving chair. Had this game been compatible with my Xbox controller,
 enabling me to turn in the direction of travel, instead of
having to use my head, this would have been perfect, and probably, for me, a5* game. All in all, not a bad game, but not recommend if you are going to play this in a confined environment, like playing in bed. Unless of course, I’m doing something wrong using just the go controller.

reviews.review_title: Great game, best shooter i ve seen on GO
reviews.review_description:
Best shooter game i have seem on GO. Would love to also tweak options, especially to turn off that spooky background music :))
Also, would be nice to move back / sideways a bit faster to avoid getting shot :) and understand what is it that makes you run vs walk slowly and how to choose what you want. Everything else is awesome!

reviews.review_title: Best game in the store right now
reviews.review_description: Has everything you need in a shooter

Good game.
Any tips on how to defeat the helicopter, I can't get past it?
It's a fun shooter, one of the better one's out there and it has a nice campaign

Nice shooter, closest to call of duty type FPS on the Go. Not sure how many levels, on LG 3 Caves just now, but got it on sale and already had my money’s worth. AI a bit suspect sometimes but the devs have done a decent job with the graphics and gameplay. Nice one 👍
